CHANGE RECORD 
When the quality of the products change s, the QUID is updated, and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the date of the Entry Into Service (EIS) of the new product and the version number to which 
the change applies. 
 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
1.0 18/01/2017 All [EIS April 2017: IBI-V3 version]  
Creation of the QUID document.  
First release of the IBI biogeochemical analysis and 
forecast product.  
Operational launch coincident with update of the 
physical product (IBI-V3 version). 
M.G. Sotillo 
T. Dabrowski 
E. Gutknecht 
P. Bowyer 
P. Lorente 
G. Reffray   
E. Álvarez Fanjul  
2.0 18/01/2018 All [EIS March 2018: IBI-V4 version]  
New system version.  
Changes on river inputs, permanent burial and 
atmospheric pCO2.  
Operational launch coincident with update of the 
physical product. 
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
M.G. Sotillo 
T. Dabrowski 
E. Gutknecht 
P. Bowyer 
 P. Lorente 
G. Reffray 
E. Álvarez Fanjul 
A. Melet 
 
2.1 12/04/2019 All [EIS July 2019: IBI-V5 version]  
New variables distributed: pH, DIC and spCO2. 
T. Dabrowski 
E. Gutknecht 
P. Lorente 
G. Reffray 
M.G. Sotillo 
 
2.2 03/04/2020  [EIS July 2020: IBI-V5 version]  
Forecast horizon extended to +10 days. 
R. Aznar  
3.0 
 
25/09/2020 All [EIS December 2020: IBI-V6 version]  
New system version.  
Revised river inputs.  
Permanent burial function of bottom friction.  
CI and OBC from new global system.   
Effect of wave-current forcing in forecast mode. 
Operational launch coincident with update of the 
physical product.  
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
J.V. McGovern 
T. Dabrowski 
E. Gutknecht 
P. Lorente 
G. Reffray 
R. Aznar 
M.G. Sotillo 
 
4.0 08/08/2022 All [EIS November 2022: IBI-V7 version]  
New system version.  
New variable distributed: zooplankton. 
Operational launch coincident with update of the 
physical product. 
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
Delivery of IBI BIO best estimate: additional hindcast 
run (coupled to the best and definitive IBI PHY 
analysis). 
E. Gutknecht 
G. Reffray 
R. Aznar 
M. G. Sotillo
